meta.description: ZenTrades AI - Demo to v1 Agent Pipeline. Import this into n8n (self-hosted via Docker).
setup_instructions: 1. Install n8n: npx n8n (or docker run -it --rm --name n8n -p 5678:5678 n8nio/n8n)
3. Import this JSON via Workflows > Import from file
5. POST to http://localhost:5678/webhook/demo-transcript with body: { account_id, transcript, pipeline_type }
